no_secrets_desc: Click 'New Secret' to add your first .env or snippet.
editor_placeholder:
# Paste your .env or code snippet here
API_KEY=your_key
DB_URL=postgresql://...
share_web_desc: Send this URL to a human. The decryption key is in the URL hash — it never leaves the browser.
share_cli_desc: Paste this one-liner in your terminal or CI-CD pipeline to fetch and decrypt the secret directly into a .env file.
shared_view_expired: This share has expired or been deleted.
shared_view_key_missing: No decryption key found in URL. Make sure you have the complete link.
delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this secret? This action cannot be undone.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_size_limit: Content exceeds the 3 MB limit. Please reduce the size before saving.
error_weak_password: Password must be at least 8 characters.
landing_sub: XodeVault is a developer secrets manager with true End-to-End Encryption. Your plaintext never leaves the browser — not even to your own server.
landing_cli_comment: Fetch and decrypt directly into .env — zero install
landing_features_title: Everything you need, nothing you don't
landing_features_sub: Built for developers who take security seriously.
landing_arch_sub: Encryption happens on your device before anything reaches the server.
feat_e2ee_desc: AES-256-GCM encryption with PBKDF2 key derivation (310k iterations). Your master password never leaves your device.
feat_zk_desc: The server stores only ciphertext and IVs. Even the admin cannot read your secrets.
feat_share_desc: Share secrets via URL. The decryption key lives in the URL hash — never sent to the server over HTTP.
feat_cli_desc: curl the share URL and pipe it into node. Decryption runs locally on your machine. No extra tools needed.
feat_crypto_desc: Open-source code. No black boxes. Expiring shares and burn-after-reading for ephemeral secrets.
feat_i18n_desc: Full English and Spanish support. Dark and light themes that persist across sessions.
apikey_subtitle: Authenticate scripts and CI/CD pipelines to push secrets programmatically.
apikey_copy_now: Copy your API key now — it will never be shown again.
apikey_revoke_confirm: Revoke this API key? Any script using it will immediately lose access.
apikey_empty_desc: Create a key to start pushing secrets from scripts or CI/CD.
apikey_info: API keys allow scripts to push encrypted secrets to your vault. The server never receives plaintext — your script must encrypt data locally before sending. Keys are hashed and cannot be recovered after creation.
docs_subtitle: Push encrypted secrets to XodeVault from scripts, CI/CD pipelines, or any HTTP client.
docs_overview_body: The XodeVault Ingest API allows you to create secrets in your vault programmatically using an API key. All secrets must be encrypted client-side before transmission — the server only stores AES-256-GCM ciphertext and never sees your plaintext or keys.
docs_e2ee_warning_title: E2EE is your responsibility via the API
docs_e2ee_warning_body: Unlike the web UI which encrypts automatically, you must encrypt your data before calling /api/ingest. Use the Node.js example below — it uses the exact same algorithm as the browser, so secrets are readable from both the UI and the API.
docs_auth_body: Authenticate every request by sending your API key in the X-Api-Key header. Generate keys from the API Keys page.
docs_auth_note: Keep your API key secret. It is equivalent to your vault password for write access.
docs_ep_ingest_post: Push a new encrypted secret to your vault
docs_ep_ingest_get: List secret IDs and creation dates (no plaintext exposed)
docs_encryption_body: Your script must use the same key derivation and encryption algorithm as the XodeVault web UI so that secrets created via API are decryptable in the browser.
docs_example_body: Complete Node.js script using only built-in modules (no install needed).
docs_download_body: Each secret can generate a self-contained Node.js or Python script that fetches its encrypted payload and decrypts it locally using your master password. The server never sees your password or the decrypted content.
docs_download_e2ee_note: The generated script embeds your API key for fetching but never your password. Decryption is 100% local — the master password is only used to derive the AES key in memory.
docs_cicd_body: Use GitHub Actions repository secrets to securely store your XodeVault credentials and push an encrypted .env on every deployment.
unlock_sub: Welcome back, {{username}}. Enter your master password to decrypt your secrets.
admin_delete_confirm: Delete user {{username}} and ALL their data? This action is irreversible.
